campaigns.subject_line: Don't let manual tasks win. Reconnect with Acme SaaS!
campaigns.preview_text: Your free trial is waiting for you to pick up where you left off. See what you're missing.
campaigns.body:
Hey there,

It looks like you haven't been active with Acme SaaS recently, and we miss you! We know running a small business can be hectic, and sometimes things fall through the cracks. But we don't want you to miss out on the incredible time-saving and productivity-boosting power that Acme SaaS offers.

Are manual tasks still slowing you down? Do you wish you had an extra pair of hands (or ten!) to manage your operations? Acme SaaS is designed precisely for that – to save you 10 hours a week, guaranteed, and make your team of one feel a lot bigger.

Your account is still here, ready for you to pick up exactly where you left off. We've even got some new templates and features we think you'll love.

Why not give it another go? We're confident that just a few minutes can remind you of the potential Acme SaaS holds for your business.

[Link to Log In/Re-activate Account]

If you need any help, our friendly support team is always here for you.

To your continued success,
The Acme SaaS Team

campaigns.subject_line:
{
  "subject_line": "We miss you! Still want to save 10 hours a week?",
  "preview_text": "Your Acme SaaS account is waiting. Let's reconnect and supercharge your business.",
  "body": "Hey there,

It's been a while since we last saw you at Acme SaaS, and we've been wondering how you're doing. We know running a small business is demanding, and sometimes things slip through the cracks.

But we also know the power of automation – the power to save you 10 hours a week, reduce manual tasks, and help your business grow without the added stress. Your account is still here, ready for you to pick up right where you left off.

We're constantly improving Acme SaaS to make it even easier for small business owners like you to thrive. If you're still looking to simplify your operations and work smarter, we're here to help.

Ready to get back on track and start saving time again?

Warmly,
The Acme SaaS Team",
  "segment": "Users inactive 30+ days"
}
Still want to save 10 hours a week? Acme Automate is waiting for you!
campaigns.preview_text: Don't let manual tasks hold you back. Reclaim your time with Acme Automate.
campaigns.body:
Hey there,

It's been a while since we last saw you on Acme Automate, and we wanted to check in. We know running a small business means every minute counts, and that's exactly why we built Acme Automate â€” to help you save a guaranteed 10 hours a week.

Remember those tedious tasks you wished would just disappear? Acme Automate makes them vanish. Whether it's automating data entry, managing customer communications, or streamlining your internal workflows, we're here to make your life easier.

Your account is still active, and those time-saving automations are ready for you. Come back and pick up right where you left off. Your team of one just got a lot bigger with Acme Automate.

Ready to get back to smarter working?

Best,
The Acme Automate Team

campaigns.subject_line:
{
  "subject_line": "We Miss You! Time-Saving Tips Inside",
  "preview_text": "Haven't seen you in a while. Are you still saving 10 hours a week?",
  "body": "Hey there,

It's been a while since we last saw you at Acme SaaS, and we wanted to check in. We know running a small business can be demanding, and sometimes things slip through the cracks.

Are you still spending too much time on manual tasks? Remember how Acme SaaS could help you save 10 hours a week, freeing you up to focus on what truly matters to your business? Many of our users find that even a small automation can make a huge difference.

We've got some exciting new updates and even more powerful ways to streamline your operations. Your team of one just got a lot bigger with Acme by your side.

We'd love to welcome you back and help you rediscover the power of automation. If you have any questions or need a refresher, we're here for you.

Come back and save some time!

Best regards,
The Acme SaaS Team",
  "segment": "Inactive users (30+ days)"
}

{
  "subject_line": "We miss you! Reconnect with Acme SaaS and save time.",
  "preview_text": "It's been a while. Discover what's new and get back to saving hours every week.",
  "body": "Hey there,

It looks like it's been a little while since you last logged into Acme SaaS, and we wanted to check in. We understand that running a small business can get hectic, but we also know how much time and effort our platform can save you.

Are you still spending too much time on manual tasks that could be automated? Remember that feeling of having a smart friend handle the repetitive work for you?

We've made some exciting updates recently, and we're always striving to make automation even simpler and more powerful for small businesses like yours. We'd hate for you to miss out on the valuable time and productivity gains you could be achieving.

Ready to get back on track? Log in now to see your existing automations or discover new ways to streamline your operations. Our friendly support team is always here if you need a hand or want to explore how Acme SaaS can tackle your current challenges.

We're here to help you work smarter and grow your business.

Hope to see you back soon,
The Acme SaaS Team",
  "segment": "Users inactive 30+ days"
}
We miss you! Still want to save 10 hours a week?
campaigns.preview_text: Don't let manual tasks slow you down. Reconnect with Acme SaaS.
campaigns.body:
Hi [User Name],

It's been a little while since we've seen you around Acme SaaS, and we wanted to check in. We know running a small business is demanding, and sometimes things fall by the wayside.

But are you still dealing with those repetitive, time-consuming tasks? The ones that steal hours from your week and keep you from focusing on what truly matters?

Acme SaaS is here to help you get those hours back. Our automation platform is designed to be the simplest way for small businesses to streamline operations, save time, and grow smarter without needing to hire more staff.

**A quick reminder of what you're missing:**
*   **Automate workflows:** Link your apps and let tasks run themselves.
*   **Boost productivity:** Free up your time to focus on growth.
*   **Simple to use:** Powerful features without the complexity.

We're constantly improving and adding new ways to help businesses like yours thrive. Why not log back in and see what's new, or explore some of our easy-to-set-up templates?

Your team of one just got a lot bigger, let us help you remember how.
The Acme SaaS Team

sequences.sequence_name:
{
  "sequence_name": "Free Trial Onboarding",
  "trigger": "New free trial user signs up",
  "emails": [
    {
      "day": 0,
      "subject_line": "Welcome to Acme SaaS! Let's save you time.",
      "preview_text": "Your free trial starts now. Here's how to get your first win in minutes.",
      "body": "Hey there!

Welcome to Acme SaaS! We're thrilled to have you on board. Our mission is simple: help small business owners like you automate operations, save a ton of time, and grow without the headaches of manual work.

Ready to see how easy it is to get started?

**Your Quick Win Today:**

1.  **Log in:** Head over to your dashboard: [Login Link]
2.  **Connect an app:** Link your favorite app (like [Example App 1] or [Example App 2]) to Acme Automate.
3.  **Create your first simple workflow:** We've got templates to make it super fast. Try automating a simple task, like getting a notification when a new lead comes in.

We're confident Acme SaaS will help you save at least 10 hours a week, guaranteed. Let's start building your smarter business today!

Happy Automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Log In & Get Started"
    },
    {
      "day": 2,
      "subject_line": "Feature Spotlight: Say goodbye to manual data entry!",
      "preview_text": "Discover how Acme Automate's smart connectors can save you hours every week.",
      "body": "Hi,

Two days in, and we hope you're already feeling the power of automation! Today, we want to spotlight one of our most loved features: **Smart Connectors**.

Imagine never having to manually transfer data between your apps again. Our Smart Connectors seamlessly link your CRM, email, project management tools, and more, ensuring your data is always where it needs to be, automatically.

**How Smart Connectors help you:**
*   **Eliminate errors:** No more typos or missed entries.
*   **Save countless hours:** Automate routine data transfers.
*   **Boost team productivity:** Free up your team for more important tasks.

This is enterprise power, at a small business price. Ready to see it in action?

Check out our guide on setting up your first Smart Connector here: [Feature Guide Link]

Happy Automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Explore Smart Connectors"
    },
    {
      "day": 5,
      "subject_line": "Don't just take our word for it... See how [Customer Name] saved 15 hours/week!",
      "preview_text": "Real results from a small business owner just like you.",
      "body": "Hey there,

We talk a lot about saving time and growing your business with automation, but don't just take *our* word for it. Meet [Customer Name], owner of [Customer Business Type] at [Customer Company Name].

Before Acme SaaS, [Customer Name] was swamped with manual tasks, spending nearly two full days a week on repetitive admin. After implementing Acme Automate, they were able to:

*   **Automate client onboarding by 80%**
*   **Reduce manual data entry by 90%**
*   **Save an incredible 15 hours every single week!**

"Acme SaaS has been a game-changer," says [Customer Name]. "It's like having an extra team member without the extra cost. My team of one just got a lot bigger!"

Ready to write your own success story? There's still plenty of time left in your free trial to see how much you can achieve.

Read [Customer Name]'s full story: [Testimonial Link]

Happy Automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Start Your Own Success Story"
    },
    {
      "day": 8,
      "subject_line": "Too busy to automate? Think again. We make it easy.",
      "preview_text": "Worried about setup? Our intuitive interface and stellar support have you covered.",
      "body": "Hi,

As a small business owner, we know your time is precious. Maybe you've thought about automation but worried it would be too complex, too time-consuming to set up, or just another tool to learn.

We hear you! That's why Acme SaaS is designed differently:

*   **Simplest Setup:** Our drag-and-drop interface and pre-built templates mean you can create workflows in minutes, not hours.
*   **Best Support:** Stuck? Our friendly, expert support team is always ready to help you every step of the way.
*   **No Coding Required:** Seriously. You don't need to be a tech expert to automate like one.

Our edge is making powerful automation accessible to everyone. Don't let perceived complexity stop you from saving hours every week.

Still have questions? Let's chat! We'd love to show you just how easy it is.

Talk to a specialist: [Support Link]

Happy Automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Get Your Questions Answered"
    },
    {
      "day": 12,
      "subject_line": "Your free trial is ending soon! Don't lose your progress.",
      "preview_text": "Unlock full power, keep your automations running, and save even more time.",
      "body": "Hey,

It's been great having you with us on the free trial! We hope you've already experienced the magic of automation and seen how Acme SaaS can transform your business.

Your free trial is wrapping up soon. To ensure you keep all your amazing automations running, continue saving those precious hours, and unlock even more powerful features, it's time to choose a plan that's right for you.

**Why Upgrade?**
*   **Keep your workflows:** Seamless transition, no re-setup needed.
*   **Unlock advanced features:** More integrations, higher usage limits, priority support.
*   **Continue saving time and money:** Our plans are designed to pay for themselves many times over.

Remember, we guarantee you'll save 10 hours a week. Invest in your business's efficiency today.

Choose your plan and continue your journey to a smarter business!

See Pricing & Upgrade Now: [Pricing Link]

Happy Automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Upgrade Now"
    }
  ]
}

  "sequence_name": "Free Trial Onboarding Sequence",
  "trigger": "New free trial user signs up",
  "emails": [
    {
      "day": 0,
      "subject_line": "Welcome to Acme SaaS! Let's get you started.",
      "preview_text": "Your free trial awaits – here's how to save time today.",
      "body": "Hi there,

Welcome to Acme SaaS! We're thrilled to have you join us. Get ready to save 10 hours a week – guaranteed – by automating your small business operations.

To help you hit the ground running, we've put together a quick-start guide to your first automation. It's simpler than you think to transform your manual tasks into streamlined workflows.

Ready to reclaim your time?

[Link to Quick-Start Guide/Simple Template]

Happy automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Start Your First Automation"
    },
    {
      "day": 2,
      "subject_line": "Unlock hidden hours with Acme Automate's smart integrations",
      "preview_text": "Discover the power that'll change your workday.",
      "body": "Hey,

Two days in, and we hope you're already feeling the Acme difference! Today, we want to spotlight one of Acme Automate's most powerful features: smart integrations.

Connect Acme Automate with your favorite apps – CRM, email marketing, project management, and more – to create seamless workflows that eliminate manual data entry and repetitive tasks. Imagine your email leads automatically adding to your CRM, or new sales triggering project tasks without you lifting a finger.

It's enterprise power, small business price, all designed to make your team of one feel a lot bigger.

Explore how connecting your tools can supercharge your productivity:

[Link to Integrations Page]

To your success,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Explore Integrations"
    },
    {
      "day": 5,
      "subject_line": "See how Sarah from 'Crafty Creations' saved 15 hours a week with Acme!",
      "preview_text": "Real success stories from businesses like yours.",
      "body": "Hi,

We love hearing success stories from small business owners just like you who are transforming their operations with Acme SaaS. Today, we want to share Sarah's journey.

Sarah, owner of 'Crafty Creations,' was swamped with manual order processing and customer communication. After implementing Acme Automate, she saved 15 hours a week – time she now dedicates to growing her business and creating more of what she loves.

"Acme Automate is a game-changer," Sarah shared. "It's like having an extra employee without the overhead."

Want to see how other small businesses are growing smarter, not harder? Read Sarah's full story and more:

[Link to Case Study/Testimonials Page]

Talk soon,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Read Sarah's Story"
    },
    {
      "day": 8,
      "subject_line": "Got questions about automation? We've got answers.",
      "preview_text": "Is Acme right for your business? Let's talk.",
      "body": "Hello,

As you explore Acme SaaS, you might have questions. Perhaps you're wondering if automation is truly for your unique business, or if it's too complex to set up. We get it – new technology can feel daunting.

But here's the truth: Acme SaaS is built for small businesses like yours. Our edge is the simplest setup and best support in the industry. We believe saving 10 hours a week should be easy, not a headache.

We're here to help you navigate any uncertainties. Whether you need a personalized walkthrough or just want to chat through your specific challenges, our experts are ready.

Let's ensure you get the most out of your trial – and beyond:

[Link to Book a Demo/Support Page]

We're here for you,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Book a Free Demo"
    },
    {
      "day": 12,
      "subject_line": "Your free trial is ending – keep the savings going!",
      "preview_text": "Don't miss out on automating your business. Special offer inside.",
      "body": "Hi there,

Your 14-day free trial of Acme SaaS is coming to an end soon! We hope you've experienced firsthand how much time and effort our automation tools can save your small business.

Don't let those valuable hours slip away. Upgrade to a paid plan today and continue to enjoy the benefits of streamlined operations, increased productivity, and the peace of mind that comes with working smarter.

As a thank you for trying Acme SaaS, we're offering a special 20% discount on your first three months when you upgrade to any annual plan before your trial ends. That's enterprise power at an even smaller business price!

Keep growing without hiring:

[Link to Upgrade Page with Discount Automatically Applied or Code]

Act fast – this offer won't last!

Best regards,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Upgrade Now & Save 20%"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "sequence_name": "Onboarding for New Free Trial Users",
  "trigger": "User signs up for a free trial",
  "emails": [
    {
      "day": 0,
      "subject_line": "Welcome to Acme SaaS! Let's save you 10 hours this week.",
      "preview_text": "Get started with your first automation in minutes.",
      "body": "Hey there!

Welcome to Acme SaaS, the simple way for small businesses to automate the boring stuff and save a ton of time. We're thrilled to have you!

Our promise is simple: help you save at least 10 hours a week, guaranteed. And the best way to see that in action is to jump right in.

Ready for your first quick win? Let's create a simple automation today! For example, you could set up an automated email response for new leads, or sync your customer data between two apps.

It only takes a few minutes, and we're here to help every step of the way.

Happy automating!

The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Start Your First Automation Now"
    },
    {
      "day": 2,
      "subject_line": "Unlock Acme Automate — Your business will thank you!",
      "preview_text": "See how Acme Automate makes your life easier.",
      "body": "Hi there,

Hope you're enjoying your free trial! Today, we want to shine a spotlight on one of our most popular features: **Acme Automate**.

Imagine a world where your repetitive tasks just... disappear. That's Acme Automate in a nutshell. It connects your apps and handles tasks like:
*   Automatically adding new leads to your CRM.
*   Sending follow-up emails after a purchase.
*   Creating project tasks from form submissions.

Small business owners like you are using Acme Automate to reclaim hours every week, letting them focus on what truly matters: growing their business.

Ready to see how simple it is to set up your next workflow?

Cheers,

The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Explore Acme Automate"
    },
    {
      "day": 5,
      "subject_line": "Don't just take our word for it...",
      "preview_text": "See how businesses like yours thrive with Acme SaaS.",
      "body": "Hello,

We talk a lot about saving time and simplifying operations, but don't just take our word for it. Listen to Sarah, owner of 'Petal & Stem Floral':

"Before Acme SaaS, I spent hours every week manually updating customer information across different systems. Now, it's all automated! I've reclaimed at least 15 hours a week, which I now use for creative work and growing my client base. It's truly been a game-changer." - Sarah K., Petal & Stem Floral

Sarah's story is just one of many. Small businesses around the globe are discovering how Acme SaaS helps them work smarter, not harder, and achieve their goals without the enterprise price tag.

Ready to be our next success story?

Best,

The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Read More Success Stories"
    },
    {
      "day": 8,
      "subject_line": "Too busy for automation? Think again.",
      "preview_text": "The #1 reason businesses *don't* automate (and why you should).",
      "body": "Hi,

We hear it all the time: 'I'm too busy to set up automation.'

It sounds counterintuitive, right? But the truth is, many small business owners feel overwhelmed by the thought of implementing new tech. They worry it's too complex, too time-consuming, or just another thing to learn.

At Acme SaaS, we've designed our platform specifically to combat these concerns.
*   **Simplest setup:** Our intuitive interface means you can set up powerful automations in minutes, not hours.
*   **Guided experience:** We offer step-by-step tutorials and templates to get you started quickly.
*   **Award-winning support:** Our team is always here to help if you hit a snag.

Think of the few minutes you invest now as an investment in hours saved every single week. It's enterprise power, small business price, and built for *your* busy schedule.

Don't let 'too busy' stop you from saving time.

Warmly,

The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "See How Easy It Is"
    },
    {
      "day": 12,
      "subject_line": "Your free trial is almost up! Ready for limitless automation?",
      "preview_text": "Unlock more power and continue saving hours every week.",
      "body": "Hello,

Your Acme SaaS free trial is wrapping up soon, and we hope you've had a taste of how much time and effort you can save with smarter automation.

Imagine continuing to:
*   Automatically onboard new clients.
*   Sync your data effortlessly across apps.
*   Never miss a follow-up again.

By upgrading to one of our paid plans, you'll unlock unlimited automations, advanced features, and priority support — all designed to help your small business grow without hiring more staff.

Choose the plan that's right for you:
*   **Acme Automate ($29/mo):** Essential workflow automation.
*   **Acme Connect ($49/mo):** CRM + email, perfect for sales & marketing.
*   **Acme Grow ($79/mo):** The full suite for ultimate efficiency.

Don't let your productivity gains disappear. Upgrade today and keep working smarter!

Best regards,

The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Choose Your Plan & Upgrade"
    }
  ]
}

{
  "sequence_name": "Free Trial Onboarding",
  "trigger": "New free trial user signs up",
  "emails": [
    {
      "day": 0,
      "subject_line": "Welcome to Acme SaaS! Let's get you automating.",
      "preview_text": "Your free trial starts now. Here's your first step to saving hours.",
      "body": "Hi [Name],

Welcome aboard! We're thrilled to have you join Acme SaaS and start your journey to saving serious time and growing your business without the headaches.

At Acme SaaS, we believe in making powerful automation accessible for every small business. No more manual grunt work, no more scrambling to keep up. Just smart, simple solutions that work for you.

**Ready for your first quick win?**

We've put together a super-short guide to help you set up your first automation in Acme Automate in under 10 minutes. It's like having an extra pair of hands, instantly.

*Imagine saving 10 hours a week — guaranteed.*

Let's get started!

Cheers,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Set Up Your First Automation Now"
    },
    {
      "day": 2,
      "subject_line": "Unlock One-Click Workflow Templates: The easiest way to automate tasks",
      "preview_text": "Discover how Acme Automate can streamline your daily operations.",
      "body": "Hi [Name],

Hope you're enjoying your Acme SaaS trial so far!

Today, we want to shine a spotlight on one of our most loved features: **One-Click Workflow Templates**.

Small business owners like you are using One-Click Workflow Templates to automate their lead follow-up, manage their social media scheduling, or create instant reports. It's designed to take the complexity out of setting up new automations, so you can focus on what truly matters: growing your business.

Think of it this way: *your team of one just got a lot bigger.*

Want to see it in action? We've got a quick tutorial that shows you exactly how One-Click Workflow Templates can save you time this week.

To your success,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Explore One-Click Workflow Templates"
    },
    {
      "day": 5,
      "subject_line": "See how Jane from 'Jane's Bakery' saved 15 hours a week with Acme SaaS",
      "preview_text": "Don't just take our word for it. Real small businesses, real results.",
      "body": "Hi [Name],

By now, you've probably started to see the potential of Acme SaaS. But don't just take our word for it! We love hearing how our customers are transforming their businesses.

Meet Jane from Jane's Bakery. Before Acme SaaS, she was drowning in manual data entry, losing valuable hours every week.

After implementing Acme Automate, Jane told us: *"Acme SaaS isn't just a tool, it's a game-changer. We've reclaimed 15 hours a week and our team is happier and more productive. It's enterprise power, small business price."*

Imagine achieving similar results for your business! What could you do with an extra 10 hours a week?

We're here to help you get there.

Best,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Read Jane's Story"
    },
    {
      "day": 8,
      "subject_line": "Too busy to automate? Think again.",
      "preview_text": "We get it. You're busy. But automation is easier than you think.",
      "body": "Hi [Name],

As a small business owner, we know your plate is full. You might be thinking, "This looks great, but I just don't have the time to set it all up."

We hear you, and it's a common concern!

That's why Acme SaaS was built with simplicity in mind. Our no-nonsense approach means:

*   **Quick Setup:** Most users are up and running with their first automation in under 15 minutes.
*   **Intuitive Design:** No complex coding or technical jargon required. If you can click, you can automate.
*   **Top-notch Support:** Our friendly team is always here to help you every step of the way.

*Save 10 hours a week — guaranteed.* This isn't just a dream, it's a reality for businesses like yours. The time you invest now will pay dividends for months and years to come.

Let us show you how easy it truly is.

Warmly,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Book a Free Strategy Call"
    },
    {
      "day": 12,
      "subject_line": "Your free trial is ending soon — don't lose your progress!",
      "preview_text": "Upgrade today and keep all your automations running smoothly. Plus, a special offer for you.",
      "body": "Hi [Name],

Your free trial of Acme SaaS is coming to an end in just a few days!

We hope you've seen how Acme SaaS can transform your business, saving you valuable time and boosting productivity. Don't let your hard work stop now!

**Upgrade to a paid plan today** and continue to enjoy all the benefits:

*   **Acme Automate:** Workflow automation for just $29/month.

*   **Acme Grow:** Our full suite for only $79/month.

**Special Offer for Trial Users:** Sign up for any annual plan today and get your first month free!

Keep those automations running, keep growing your business, and keep saving those precious hours.

We can't wait to continue being a part of your success!

Sincerely,
The Acme SaaS Team",

    }
  ]
}

sequences.trigger: New free trial user signs up

emails.subject_line: Welcome to Acme Automate! Let's get you saving time.
emails.preview_text: Your free trial starts now. Here's how to get your first win.
emails.body:
Hey there! 

Welcome to Acme Automate, the tool designed to help small businesses like yours save a guaranteed 10 hours a week. We're excited to have you on board!

We know you're busy, so let's get straight to it. Your first quick win is just a few clicks away.

**Here's a simple automation to get started:** Link your email (Gmail/Outlook) to automatically save attachments to a cloud drive (Google Drive/Dropbox). It takes minutes and frees up your inbox instantly!

Ready to reclaim your time?

Cheers,
The Acme Automate Team

emails.subject_line: Unlock more power: Automate your customer follow-ups
emails.preview_text: See how Acme Connect can transform your sales process.
emails.body:
Hi,

Two days in, and we hope you're already feeling the power of automation! Today, we want to shine a spotlight on a feature that transforms how small businesses connect with their customers: **Automated Customer Follow-ups.**

Imagine never forgetting to follow up after a meeting or a sale. Acme Connect (part of Acme Grow) allows you to set up automated email sequences based on customer actions. It's enterprise power, at a small business price.

This means more engaged leads, happier customers, and ultimately, more sales – all without lifting a finger after the initial setup. Your team of one just got a lot bigger!

Ready to deepen customer relationships?

Best,
The Acme Automate Team

emails.subject_line: Don't just take our word for it...
emails.preview_text: Hear how small businesses like yours are succeeding with Acme Automate.
emails.body:
Hello,

We talk a lot about saving time and boosting productivity, but nothing speaks louder than real results from real small businesses.

Take Sarah, owner of a thriving online boutique. Before Acme, she spent hours manually processing orders and sending updates. After implementing Acme Automate, she now saves 15 hours a week, allowing her to focus on product development and marketing. She told us, 'Acme gave me my evenings back!'

Stories like Sarah's are why we do what we do. We believe every small business deserves the tools to thrive and grow without the overwhelm.

Inspired to write your own success story?

Best regards,
The Acme Automate Team

emails.subject_line: Got questions about Acme Automate? We've got answers.
emails.preview_text: Overcome common hurdles and make Acme work perfectly for your business.
emails.body:
Hi there,

As you explore Acme Automate, you might have questions. 'Is it too complex for me?' 'Will it integrate with my specific tools?' 'How can I customize it for my unique workflow?'

We hear you. That's why we've built our platform to be as intuitive as possible, and our support team is always here to help. Acme is designed to be the simplest setup with the best support, totally SMB-focused.

Whether you need help connecting an app, setting up a complex workflow, or just want to chat about possibilities, we're here. No corporate jargon, just clear, friendly advice.

Let us help you make the most of your trial.

Talk soon,
The Acme Automate Team

emails.subject_line: Your trial is ending â€“ Keep saving time!
emails.preview_text: Don't lose momentum. Upgrade your Acme Automate account today and lock in your savings.
emails.body:
Hello,

Your free trial of Acme Automate is coming to an end soon. We hope you've enjoyed saving time and making your operations smoother.

Imagine continuing to reclaim those 10+ hours a week, automating your tedious tasks, and feeling that amazing productivity boost every day. Don't let that momentum stop!

Upgrade to a paid plan today and continue to experience enterprise power at a small business price. Choose the plan that best fits your needs and start making your team of one a whole lot bigger.

Ready to make automation a permanent part of your business?

Sincerely,
The Acme Automate Team

  "emails": [
    {
      "day": 0,
      "subject_line": "Welcome to Acme SaaS! Let's save you some time.",
      "preview_text": "Your free trial starts now. Here's how to get a quick win.",
      "body": "Hi there,

Welcome to Acme SaaS! We're thrilled to have you join our community of small business owners who are fed up with manual work and ready to automate. Our mission is simple: help businesses like yours save *at least 10 hours a week* by taking tedious tasks off your plate.

Ready for a quick win? We've got a template to help you automate lead capture from your website in minutes. Imagine leads flowing directly into your CRM without you lifting a finger – that's 30 minutes saved, every single day!

It’s enterprise power, with small business price and simplicity. Let's get you started.

Happy automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Get Your First Automation Set Up"
    },
    {
      "day": 2,
      "subject_line": "Unlock More Time: A Powerful Feature You'll Love",
      "preview_text": "Discover how our intuitive workflow builder can transform your operations.",
      "body": "Hey there,

Hope you're enjoying your Acme SaaS trial! We've heard from thousands of small businesses that one of their biggest time-sinks is fragmented data and manual updates across different tools. 

That's why today, we want to spotlight a feature our most successful users rave about: **our intuitive drag-and-drop workflow builder.** 

Imagine: no more copying and pasting, no more missed follow-ups. Just seamless information flow between your apps, all orchestrated by you with a few clicks. Your team of one just got a lot bigger!

Ready to see it in action and truly save 10 hours a week?

Cheers,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Explore the Workflow Builder"
    },
    {
      "day": 5,
      "subject_line": "Don't Just Take Our Word For It...",
      "preview_text": "See how businesses like yours are saving 10+ hours a week with Acme Automate.",
      "body": "Hi,

We could tell you all day how much time Acme SaaS saves, but we think it’s better to hear it from our amazing customers. 

Take Sarah, owner of 'Petal & Stem Florals.' Before Acme, she was spending hours each week manually processing online orders and updating inventory. After implementing Acme Automate, she now saves **15 hours a week** – time she now uses to focus on creative design and customer relationships. Her words: 'It's like having a silent, super-efficient employee working 24/7!'

Acme SaaS is all about helping you work smarter, not harder, so you can focus on what truly matters to your business.

Ready to be our next success story?

Best,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Read More Success Stories"
    },
    {
      "day": 8,
      "subject_line": "Got Questions? We've Got Answers.",
      "preview_text": "Thinking Acme SaaS might be too complex or expensive? Let's clear that up.",
      "body": "Hey there,

As your free trial nears its end, you might have some questions or even a few hesitations. We get it! Many small business owners worry about new software being too complicated or just another expensive tool.

**Too complicated?** Not with Acme. We’re built for simplicity, with an intuitive interface and a dedicated support team ready to help you every step of the way. We pride ourselves on the simplest setup and best support in the industry. 

**Too expensive?** Absolutely not. We offer enterprise power at a small business price. Our plans are designed to pay for themselves by freeing up your most valuable asset: your time. Saving 10 hours a week for just $29/month? That's a no-brainer.

Have a specific question? We're here to help.

Talk soon,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Talk to Our Experts"
    },
    {
      "day": 12,
      "subject_line": "Last Chance: Don't Lose Your Progress!",
      "preview_text": "Your free trial ends in 48 hours. Lock in your savings and keep automating.",
      "body": "Hi,

This is a friendly reminder that your free trial of Acme SaaS is ending in **48 hours!** 

Don't let all the amazing automations you've built and the time you've already started saving disappear. Imagine going back to manual tasks after experiencing the freedom of automation...

Ready to continue saving 10 hours a week and unlock the full power of Acme?

Secure your plan today and keep your progress!

Sincerely,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Upgrade Now & Save"
    }
  ]

{
  "sequence_name": "New Free Trial Onboarding",
  "trigger": "New free trial user sign-up",
  "emails": [
    {
      "day": 0,
      "subject_line": "Welcome to Acme SaaS! Let's automate your first task.",
      "preview_text": "Your free trial begins now. Here's your quick win to save time immediately.",
      "body": "Hi there,

Welcome to Acme SaaS! We're thrilled to have you. You've just taken the first step towards saving at least 10 hours a week and growing your business without the headache of manual work.

Our mission is simple: to give small business owners like you enterprise-level power at a small business price. Think of us as your smart friend who happens to be a tech expert, here to help you work smarter, not harder.

Ready for your first quick win? Let's get you set up with your very first automation in under 5 minutes. It's easier than you think!

**Quick Start Guide:**
1. Log into your new Acme SaaS account.
2. Click 'Create New Automation'.
3. Choose from our popular templates, like 'Automate Social Media Posts' or 'Sync Leads to CRM'.
4. Follow the simple steps to connect your apps.

You'll be amazed at how quickly you can free up valuable time.

To your success,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Start Your First Automation"
    },
    {
      "day": 2,
      "subject_line": "Unlock More Time: Automate Client Follow-ups with Acme Connect",
      "preview_text": "See how Acme Connect can automatically nurture your leads and clients.",
      "body": "Hey,

Two days into your trial, and we hope you're already feeling the power of automation! Today, we want to shine a spotlight on a feature that transforms how you manage client relationships: **Acme Connect's automated follow-ups**.

Imagine never missing a follow-up with a lead or client again. Acme Connect lets you build simple workflows that automatically send personalized emails based on triggers like a new lead signup, a purchase, or a specific interaction. It's like having a dedicated assistant for your communications.

**How it helps you:**
*   **Save hours** on manual email sending.
*   **Improve client engagement** with timely, relevant messages.
*   **Grow your business** by nurturing leads effortlessly.

Ready to see it in action? Set up your first client follow-up automation today!

Happy automating,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Explore Acme Connect"
    },
    {
      "day": 5,
      "subject_line": "How [Customer Name] Saved 15 Hours A Week with Acme SaaS",
      "preview_text": "Hear how real small businesses are achieving big results with automation.",
      "body": "Hi there,

At Acme SaaS, we're all about real results for real small businesses. And nothing speaks louder than the success stories of our users.

Meet Sarah, owner of 'Petal & Stem Florists'. Sarah was drowning in administrative tasks – manually updating inventory, sending order confirmations, and scheduling social media posts. She tried other tools, but they were too complex and expensive.

With Acme Automate, Sarah quickly set up workflows to:
*   Automatically update her online store inventory.
*   Send instant, personalized order confirmations.
*   Schedule her social media content weeks in advance.

**The result?** Sarah now saves an incredible **15 hours a week**, allowing her to focus on what she loves: creating beautiful floral arrangements and growing her business without hiring additional staff. She says, "Acme SaaS truly made my team of one feel a lot bigger!"

Ready to write your own success story? Start automating a new task today!

To your growth,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Read More Success Stories"
    },
    {
      "day": 8,
      "subject_line": "Is Automation Too Complex? Not With Acme SaaS!",
      "preview_text": "We address your biggest questions and show you how simple it can be.",
      "body": "Hey,

As your free trial continues, you might be thinking: "This sounds great, but is it too complicated for me?" or "What if I get stuck?"

We get it. Other automation tools can feel like you need a degree in computer science. But at Acme SaaS, we've designed our platform specifically for small business owners – which means it's intuitive, user-friendly, and backed by incredible support.

**Here's why Acme SaaS is different:**
*   **Simplest Setup**: Our guided templates mean you can set up powerful automations in minutes, not hours.
*   **Award-Winning Support**: Our friendly experts are here 24/7 via chat, email, or phone to help you with any question, big or small.
*   **Clear & Concise**: No corporate jargon or overly technical language. Just clear, action-oriented guidance.

You don't need to be a tech expert; you just need to know what you want to automate, and we'll show you how.

Still have questions? We'd love to chat!

Don't hesitate to reach out,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Chat With Support"
    },
    {
      "day": 12,
      "subject_line": "Your Trial is Almost Over! Keep Saving Time (and Money).",
      "preview_text": "Don't lose access to your automated workflows. Upgrade now and get a special offer!",
      "body": "Hi there,

Your free trial with Acme SaaS is coming to an end in just 3 days! We hope you've enjoyed experiencing how easy it is to save 10+ hours a week and make your business run smoother.

Don't let all the time you've saved slip away. Now is the perfect time to upgrade to a paid plan and ensure your automations keep running, your leads keep flowing, and your business keeps growing without missing a beat.

**Why Upgrade Now?**
*   **Seamless Transition**: Your current automations and settings will carry over instantly.
*   **Unlock Full Power**: Access all features, unlimited automations, and premium support.
*   **Special Offer Just For You**: As a thank you for trying us out, upgrade today and get **20% off your first 3 months** on any annual plan! That's enterprise power at an even smaller business price.

Imagine the continued time savings, the enhanced productivity, and the peace of mind knowing your operations are running on autopilot. Don't go back to manual work!

This exclusive offer expires when your trial does, so act fast to secure your savings.

Keep automating and growing,
The Acme SaaS Team",
      "cta": "Upgrade Your Account Now & Save 20%"
    }
  ]
}
